Much like our EECS Day event, Junior EECS Day provides a taste of EECS at UC Berkeley for all those interested. Specifically catering to students from grade 5-8 as well as their families, our HKN members will lead participants on a fun-filled day fea

ers will lead participants on a fun-filled day featuring introductory hands-on EECS activities and labs, a tour of campus, spectate a robotics competition, and a showcase at the end of the day. Event Date: April 14th, 20180 (Annual, Spring Semester)

Date: April 14th, 20180 (Annual, Spring Semester) Schedule: 9:50 - 10:00 a.m. Check-in @ Wozniak Lounge 10:00 - 10:30 a.m. Introduction and Speaker @ Wozniak Lounge 10:30 a.m. - 12:00 p.m. CS Lab @ 271, 273 Soda 12:00 - 1:00 p.m. Lunch @ Wozniak Loun

1, 273 Soda 12:00 - 1:00 p.m. Lunch @ Wozniak Lounge 1:00 - 2:30 p.m. EE Lab @ 140 Cory 2:30 - 3:00 p.m. EECS Campus Tour 3:00 - 3:30 p.m. Wrap-up and Sign Out @ HP Auditorium Event Gallery: Eta Kappa Nu, Mu Chapter HOME | CONTACT
